# [Short imperative title]

**Type:** Feature | Fix | Refactor | Chore

## Summary

One to three sentences describing what this change is and why it matters.
Omit if the title is self-explanatory.

## Description

The main body. Use paragraphs, lists, or subsections as needed.
Describe *what* should happen, not *how* to implement it.

Include UI/UX details, behavioral rules, edge cases, or constraints
that are part of the requirement — not part of the implementation plan.

## Use Cases

Optional. Concrete scenarios that illustrate expected behavior.

- When user does X, then Y should happen.
- When there is no Z set, the system defaults to W.

## Hints

Optional. Soft guidance — not implementation steps. Pointers to related areas,
known tradeoffs, or constraints worth keeping in mind during planning.

## Out of Scope

Optional. Explicit exclusions to prevent scope creep.
